parents.subject: LU-18231 obd: change obd_need_scrub into OBDF_NEED_SCRUB

commit.subject: LU-18231 obd: change obd_no_transno into OBDF_NO_TRANSNO
commit.message:
LU-18231 obd: change obd_no_transno into OBDF_NO_TRANSNO

Change the use of the odb_no_transno bitfield into a bit in
the ofd_flags bitmap and use atomic bit set/clear/test
operations on it.
No logical changes to the code and no changes to locking.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Build-Parameters: distro=el9.3 arch=x86_64
Signed-off-by: Ronnie Sahlberg <rsahlberg@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: Ib8df712ff77c62f0f6f18e65473af567696dba4b
